content:
Coordinate worker delegation for this round.
Target agents: POOL-0..POOL-1.
Available shapes: 23 shapes available (23 unprocessed).
Batch target: 2 shapes.

OPTIMIZED SHAPE DISTRIBUTION (batch-size=1, 2 workers, 2 total shapes):
POOL-0: shapes [0..1) - InstallationShape (class: Installation)
POOL-1: shapes [1..2) - EmissionPointShape (class: EmissionPoint)

Delegate immediately using these assignments.
NOTE: a shape's name is the validation rule's name, not necessarily a class name - never assume it is one. Tell each worker to type instances with the class shown in parentheses after each shape above, not with the shape's own name.

First pass: delegate the next batch and keep instructions concise.

Use SHACL context as source of truth for constraints.

Delegate immediately:
- Call `delegate_tasks` for each worker that should run this round.
- Keep each assignment short and concrete.
- Include target shape(s), target class, and whether to CREATE new instances or FIX existing ones.
- Include unresolved focus node/property details when available from Validation Report.
- Require worker tool call: worker_progress(status, target_shape, target_class, changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).
- In every assignment, restate the exact IRI pattern new instances must use: the ontology's default
  prefix (the one shown as `@prefix : <...>` or `@prefix ontologynamehere: <...>` in the Ontology/SHACL context -
  pick ONE and tell every worker to use that SAME one, not a mix), followed by the exact class local name with a logical and consistent URI. Workers across different rounds/pools must not invent their own casing or
  numbering convention for the same class.
- Remind workers that predicates/classes must come only from the ontology/SHACL context - never
  invented - and that each triplestore_add call is validated as a standalone Turtle document.

Rules:
- Do not produce long analysis text; prioritize immediate tool calls.
- Skip workers with no actionable assignment.
- Always instruct workers to create instances when assigned target class has no instances.
- Keep workers scoped to assigned shapes/classes only.
I'll start by reading the available contexts to understand the ontology, SHACL shapes, and current state before delegating.

{"content":"MyGlassFactory is a glass factory that produces glass. They have a factory (Operation) that deploys
multiple systems. This Operation is located on a location (platform).

The factory implements a process that is subdivided into multiple steps that describe the process of producing glass. A process
can be subdivided into other processes.

An emission point is a point where emissions are released into the environment. A proces may be implemented by an
emission point (or other system).

Multiple versions of the factory (operation) exist. Versions may have an overlap in systems, processes but also differences.","type":"text/plain","name":"example file","length":613}

Good. No output file exists yet, and no worker progress has been submitted. The ontology uses `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>` as the default prefix. Let me note key findings:

- **InstallationShape** targets class `:Installation` (note: SHACL shape name ≠ class name)
- **EmissionPointShape** targets class `:EmissionPoint` 
- Both classes require mandatory properties: `rdfs:label`, `dc:issued`, `dc:created`, `dc:modified`, `adms:status`, `sosa:isHostedBy` (to `:OperationLocation`)
- URI pattern from hydra templates: `https://example.org/id/Installation/{uuid}/{issued}/{created}` and `https://example.org/id/emissiepunt/{uuid}/{issued}/{created}`
- No existing instances in output — workers need to CREATE

Now I'll delegate both workers simultaneously:

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-0","instructions":"TARGET SHAPE: InstallationShape | TARGET CLASS: :Installation (owl:Class)

TASK: CREATE new :Installation instances from scratch. No instances exist yet.

CONSTRAINTS (from SHACL):
MUST HAVE (minCount=1): rdfs:label, dc:issued (xsd:date), dc:created (xsd:dateTime), dc:modified (xsd:dateTime), adms:status (:adms:Status — use :actief, :inactief, :gesloten, or :voorgesteld), sosa:isHostedBy (:OperationLocation)
OPTIONAL: dc:type (max 1), ssn:hasProperty (:InstallationProperty), ogc:hasGeometry, ssn:implements (:Process), prov:wasRevisionOf (ssn:System), :section (:Section), adms:identifier (adms:Identifier), ssn:hasDeployment (:Operation), ssn:hasSubSystem (ssn:System), inverse ssn:hasSubSystem

URI PATTERN: Use prefix `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>` and create instances like :Installation_1, :Installation_2 etc. with local names following PascalCase numbering.

PREDICATES/CLASSES: Use ONLY from the ontology/SHACL context. Never invent predicates or classes. Each triplestore_add call is validated as standalone Turtle.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Create at least 2 representative :Installation instances
- Include an inline :OperationLocation for sosa:isHostedBy (must have rdfs:label, dc:issued, dc:created, dc:modified)
- Use adms:status from defined concepts (:actief recommended)
- Ensure all mandatory constraints are satisfied
- After adding data, validate with shacl_validator (source='store') and report results

SUBMIT worker_progress(status, target_shape="InstallationShape", target_class=":Installation", changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","context_name":"Delegation Instructions"})
{"target_agent":"POOL-0","status":"success","context_name":"Delegation Instructions","characters":1589}

delegate_tasks({"target_agent":"POOL-1","instructions":"TARGET SHAPE: EmissionPointShape | TARGET CLASS: :EmissionPoint (owl:Class)

TASK: CREATE new :EmissionPoint instances from scratch. No instances exist yet.

CONSTRAINTS (from SHACL):
MUST HAVE (minCount=1): rdfs:label, dc:issued (xsd:date), dc:created (xsd:dateTime), dc:modified (xsd:dateTime), adms:status (:adms:Status — use :actief, :inactief, :gesloten, or :voorgesteld), sosa:isHostedBy (:OperationLocation)
OPTIONAL: dc:type (max 1), ogc:hasGeometry, ssn:hasSubSystem (ssn:System), inverse ssn:hasSubSystem, dbo:depth, dbo:height, dbo:diameter, adms:identifier (adms:Identifier), ssn:hasDeployment (:Operation), prov:wasRevisionOf (ssn:System)

URI PATTERN: Use prefix `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>` and create instances like :EmissionPoint_1, :EmissionPoint_2 etc. with local names following PascalCase numbering.

PREDICATES/CLASSES: Use ONLY from the ontology/SHACL context. Never invent predicates or classes. Each triplestore_add call is validated as standalone Turtle.

REQUIREMENTS:
- Create at least 2 representative :EmissionPoint instances
- Include an inline :OperationLocation for sosa:isHostedBy (must have rdfs:label, dc:issued, dc:created, dc:modified)
- Use adms:status from defined concepts (:actief recommended)
- Optionally include ogc:hasGeometry with WKT and stack properties (dbo:height, dbo:diameter) for variety
- Ensure all mandatory constraints are satisfied
- After adding data, validate with shacl_validator (source='store') and report results

SUBMIT worker_progress(status, target_shape="EmissionPointShape", target_class=":EmissionPoint", changed_triples_count, validation_result, remaining_issues).","context_name":"Delegation Instructions"})
{"target_agent":"POOL-1","status":"success","context_name":"Delegation Instructions","characters":1651}

Both workers have been delegated. Now I'll wait for their progress reports before proceeding to the next round.

**Round 1 Summary:**
- **POOL-0**: Assigned `InstallationShape` → class `:Installation`. Task: CREATE ≥2 instances with all mandatory SHACL constraints (label, issued, created, modified, status, isHostedBy).
- **POOL-1**: Assigned `EmissionPointShape` → class `:EmissionPoint`. Task: CREATE ≥2 instances with all mandatory SHACL constraints.
- Both workers instructed to use `@prefix : <https://example.org/ns/riepr#>`, create inline `:OperationLocation` hosts, and validate with `shacl_validator(source='store')`.
- Both required to submit structured `worker_progress` payloads.

Waiting for worker progress reports to assess validation results before next delegation round.
